summary: Kang Hyeon-i and Teng-i enter a cave where they defeat a Romelon monster and encounter a mysterious individual named Leon Meer. Leon reveals that he is protecting the cave from creatures emerging from Devildom and shares information about the current state of adventurers. After completing his quest and establishing a connection with Leon, Kang Hyeon-i later meets with Mascherano to discuss the current state of the Colosseum and a figure named Rain.
key_moments: Kang Hyeon-i defeats a Romelon monster in the cave.
Leon Meer blocks Kang Hyeon-i's attack with one finger and engages in a conversation.
Kang Hyeon-i receives quest rewards and clears the investigation of Buzz Island's central cave.
Kang Hyeon-i meets with Mascherano to discuss the Colosseum and the influence of a character named Rain.
